texts.label: text
texts.orig: This patch adds a Reminder Dialog Search Report option to the Reminder Dialog Report menu. The Reminder Dialog Search Report allows sites to find Reminder Dialogs based on search criteria such as Coding Systems, Findings, and Dialog Items.
texts.text: This patch adds a Reminder Dialog Search Report option to the Reminder Dialog Report menu. The Reminder Dialog Search Report allows sites to find Reminder Dialogs based on search criteria such as Coding Systems, Findings, and Dialog Items.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: PXRM*2*53 adds a Reminder Dialog Search Report option to the Reminder Dialog Report menu. The Reminder Dialog Search Report allows sites to find Reminder Dialogs that contain user entered search criteria such as Coding Systems, Findings, and Dialog components.
texts.text: PXRM*2*53 adds a Reminder Dialog Search Report option to the Reminder Dialog Report menu. The Reminder Dialog Search Report allows sites to find Reminder Dialogs that contain user entered search criteria such as Coding Systems, Findings, and Dialog components.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are three main search options that can be used individually or combined together to get a larger report:
texts.text: There are three main search options that can be used individually or combined together to get a larger report:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Search for Finding Item(s) used in dialog component(s)
texts.text: Search for Finding Item(s) used in dialog component(s)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Search for specific Reminder Dialog component(s)
texts.text: Search for specific Reminder Dialog component(s)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you select Yes at the Search for coding system prompt and you also select Yes to one of the other prompts, this would work IN ADDITION TO the code search. Your output would have the dialogs that contained the coding system selected and also any dialogs that have the finding item or dialog item selected. If you only wanted to know every dialog that contained a coding system, select yes to the first coding prompt and select no to the next two prompts.
texts.text: If you select Yes at the Search for coding system prompt and you also select Yes to one of the other prompts, this would work IN ADDITION TO the code search. Your output would have the dialogs that contained the coding system selected and also any dialogs that have the finding item or dialog item selected. If you only wanted to know every dialog that contained a coding system, select yes to the first coding prompt and select no to the next two prompts.
